title: bossiaea battii
intro: Bossiaea battii, also known as the 'native pea', is a species of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Bossiaea battii include its ability to alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Bossiaea battii are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
